full_text:
Zhang Wen (Boshen) 張溫 (伯慎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Wen (張溫), styledBoshen (伯慎), was born in Rang county, Nanyang commandery. First ever Han Excellency appointed when out of the capital, struggled to deal with Han Sui. Zhang Wen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhang Wen lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
